content.en:
"If I can find a ruin snake in the Immeasurable Realm Ruins, I can copy a ruin snake and use the ability of the ruin snake to find ruin gold!"

Ye Tian thought so.

Now the only difficulty is to find the ruin snake!

......

Immeasurable Ruins.

Ye Tian's copy body is here to look for the existence of the ruin snake, and with his current strength, he is not afraid of the ordinary fifth-stage immeasurable ruin monster.

Therefore, he directly did not use the immeasurable ruin monster's copy body as a cover, and directly used the real body copy body to find the existence of the ruin snake.

Along the way, he encountered many immeasurable ruin monsters, but he killed them all.

Gradually, there was some inexplicable aura on his body.

This aura made ordinary Infinite Ruin Monsters dare not come to him for trouble again, but the Infinite Ruins who dared to come to him for trouble have all reached the fifth stage.

this day.

Ye Tian also encountered an immeasurable realm beast, the strength of this immeasurable realm beast was very strong, even Ye Tian could only barely compete with the other party, and it was impossible to kill the other party.

"Difficult fellow!"

Ye Tian kept fleeing, and it took a long time to get rid of this immeasurable beast.

Time flies, Ye Tian has found many places in the immeasurable ruins, and has also encountered many dangers.

Again, he encountered an incomparably terrifying immeasurable ruin monster, the opponent's strength was far superior to Ye Tian, and he directly killed Ye Tian in an instant.

Of course, just losing a replica body was not a loss for Ye Tian.

In this way, Ye Tian had been searching for millions of realms in the Infinite Realm Ruins, and he had lost many times just by copying his body.

Finally on this day, Ye Tian found a ruin snake, and it was also a fourth-stage ruin snake, which just met Ye Tian's requirements.

When he found the snake, it sensed it and fled at an extremely terrifying speed.

"It's so fast, much faster than me!"

Ye Tian sighed.

If there's no way to limit the speed of the ruin snake, there's really no way to catch it.

And this is the Infinite Realm Ruins, which is an environment suitable for ruin snakes, not for cultivators, so it is not easy to limit the speed of ruin snakes here.

Ye Tian didn't need to catch the ruin snake, the moment he found the ruin snake, the copying talent could copy its body.

After this ruin snake left, Ye Tian began to copy the ruin snake.

Not long after, a ruin snake was copied by Ye Tian.

After copying the body of the ruin snake, Ye Tiancai finally knew why the speed of the ruin snake was so fast!

It turned out that if the speed of the ruin snake was in a place like the Xuanqi Realm, its speed would be similar to that of a normal fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform.

But in the immeasurable ruins, cultivators could not travel through time and space, they could only fly, and their speed was limited.

The Ruin Snake is different, not only is it not restricted, but it can also mobilize the power of the Infinite Boundary Ruins to advance its own speed, which can make itself faster.

"It's a pity that I still haven't sensed the existence of ruin gold, it should be that there is no ruin gold nearby, so the ruin snake can't sense it!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Immediately, Ye Tian, the replicating body of the ruin snake, began to wander around the Infinite Realm Ruins, looking for the existence of ruin gold.

Time passed slowly, and Ye Tian had been to many places.

this day.

Ye Tian's ruin snake replica body finally had a special sense, and in his perception, there were golden rays of light in a certain area in the distance.

That place was far away from him, but the ruin snake copied its body and sensed it, and the sense was clear.

"Could it be ruin gold?"

Ye Tian flew over directly.

After some time, he finally arrived at his destination.

It was the ruins of a nest of immeasurable ruins, which, judging by the traces, had been destroyed in the eons of time, and was surrounded by fragments.

Moreover, there are no resources here, even if the Great Ancestors come here, it is estimated that they will not stay here.

However, Ye Tian's ruin snake copy body sensed a golden light from some soil fragments.

But if he used normal means to probe, he couldn't detect anything.

Rumble!

Ye Tian swept away these soil fragments with the tail of the ruin snake.

In an instant, small pieces of gritty metal were revealed.

"Ruin gold!"

Although Ye Tian had never seen ruin gold, he was sure that this was ruin gold.

Because the fluctuations of this metal are a little similar to the origin gold crystal, it obviously contains the same substance, what is this not ruin gold?

Ye Tian collected all the ruins of gold here, and found a total of hundreds of ruins of gold.

However, the volume of ruin gold is too small, even if it is hundreds of ruin gold, there is actually not much.

"Continue to look for ruin gold, such a little ruin gold is not enough at all, even if it can replace the origin gold crystal, but it is estimated that it will not be able to activate the Xuanqi armor!"

So, Ye Tian continued to look for the existence of ruin gold.

Among the immeasurable realm ruins, the amount of ruins is really quite a lot, but it is too scattered.

And with the ruin snake replicating the body, it was not difficult for Ye Tian to find the ruin gold.

Soon, Ye Tian found some ruin gold again, this time the amount was more, there were about more than three thousand ruin gold.

In this way, as time passed, Ye Tian found more and more ruin gold.

This day after the first year of tens of thousands of realms.

Ye Tian had his first huge harvest, and this harvest was far more than any previous one.

"So many ruins of gold !!"

Ye Tian saw dense ruins of gold, all over this area, and their number was already incalculable.

However, it has also become a treasure land for the Infinite Ruins Monsters, and countless Infinite Ruins are entrenched here.

Fortunately, there was only one fifth-stage immeasurable ruin monster here, and the others were weaker.

"I have to drive away these immeasurable ruin monsters before I can take these ruin gold!"

Thereupon.

At the cost of sacrificing a replica body, Ye Tian invaded here, fought with the dense Infinite Ruins Monster, and forcibly urged the power of the Infinite Feather Armor Mark with his strength to form a low-level version of the Infinite Feather Armor, even the fifth-stage Infinite Ruins Monster could not break through his defenses.

Under such circumstances, Ye Tian attacked wildly, and he could kill a piece of immeasurable ruin monsters in an instant.

After a long time, those immeasurable ruin monsters were also frightened, and they fled one by one.

And the fifth-stage immeasurable ruin monster, after Ye Tian sacrificed several replica bodies, it was also severely damaged, if it weren't for other immeasurable ruin monsters to share it with it, it would have fallen long ago.

And not long after, this fifth-stage immeasurable ruin monster couldn't bear it, and directly fled with other immeasurable ruin monsters, which can be regarded as giving this treasure land to Ye Tian.

In this way, Ye Tian occupied this place and immediately collected the ruin gold here!
